rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM STOMBAUGH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 16, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF NEGLIGENCE AND PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF USED DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT, THE ABERTH DECLARATIONS DO NOT EXPLAIN HOW DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS WORK. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH C.R.C. 3.1350(H). DENY MOTION AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION CLAIM AS MOOT. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES BRANHAM et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 16, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANT BUFFALO PUMPS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MILITARY CONTRACTOR DEFENSE HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS, ON THE SHIPS AT ISSUE, WERE INSPECTED AND NAVY SPECIFICATIONS CALLED FOR WARNING STATEMENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON CAUSATION. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT BASED ON THE PHILLIPS AND FENNING DECLARATIONS. =(302/PJM/KD)
